description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games or Home page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN a live game has a pitcher who has not allowed any opposing batter to reach base for any reason (hit/walk/error) and the game has reached the 6th inning
steps.result: THEN a Blue ‘PERFECT GAME’ badge is displayed on the game badge (expanded & hero only) - not present in mini state
